budgetEvidence.hardwareTimingRationale: DMG provides one physical frame per gameplay tick, while one packed column at a non-zero vertical camera offset remains prepared and committed within its video-write budget.
budgetEvidence.productionTraceRationale: The exact production source removes input, sprites, audio, collision, and gameplay while retaining the full collision-free stage1 visual fixture, the accepted one-pixel cadence, and the runner-shaped non-zero vertical camera offset. The focused X=96 limit makes the retained window cover rightward streaming, reversal, and return while comparing every visible tile and palette against authored Tiled data.
